variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17513 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17513 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17513 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson DBA8629 Air Filter, Primary Round Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17513
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson DBA8629 Air Filter, Primary Round Powercore is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 49 002 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17513
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
